zh.West Hoathly, Sussex, England: 英國素可韋斯特 霍阿利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Chesney於大約1080年出生在英國奧可福爾迪丁頓時，他的父親Ralph de Chesney37歲，母親Lady Maud de Waterville33歲。他於大約1095年與Alice Langetot在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於從1109年12月25日到1142年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.West Hoathly, Sussex, England: 英国素可韋斯特 霍阿利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Chesney于大约1080年出生在英国奧可福爾迪丁頓时，他的父亲Ralph de Chesney37岁，母亲Lady Maud de Waterville33岁。他于大约1095年与Alice Langetot在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于从1109年12月25日到1142年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Chesney was born about 1080, in Deddington, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Ralph de Chesney, was 37 and his mother, Lady Maud de Waterville, was 33. He married Alice Langetot about 1095, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died from 25 December 1109 to 1142, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Chesney est né environ 1080, à Deddington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Chesney, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Waterville, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Alice Langetot environ 1095, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé du 25 décembre 1109 au 1142, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Chesney um 1080 in Deddington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Chesney 37 und seine Mutter Lady Maud de Waterville 33. Er hat um 1095 in Oxfordshire, England Alice Langetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb von 25. Dezember 1109 bis 1142 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Chesney è nato il circa 1080 nel Deddington, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Chesney, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud de Waterville, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Alice Langetot circa 1095, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì da 25 dicembre 1109 a 1142, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Chesneyが約1080年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアデッドイントンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Chesneyは37歳，母Lady Maud de Watervilleは33歳であった。約1095年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでAlice Langetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はから1109年12月25日まで1142年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Chesney(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 스퍼드실르 데딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Chesney(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Waterville(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1095년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Alice Langetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1109년 12월 25일부터 1142년 까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Chesney nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Deddington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Chesney, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud de Waterville, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Langetot aproximadamente 1095, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu de 25 de dezembro de 1109 a 1142, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Chesney родился около 1080 г. в местности деддингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Chesney было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Waterville, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Langetot около 1095 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер с 25 декабря 1109 по 1142 в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Chesney nació aproximadamente 1080, en Deddington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Chesney, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Maud de Waterville, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Alice Langetot aproximadamente 1095, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió desde 25 de diciembre de 1109 hasta 1142, en su pueblo.
